GLOBAL.title: Steam players vs. Twitch viewers
GLOBAL.description:
The Pearson correlation coefficient is 0.48 (moderate).
The result is statistically significant (p = 0.0000) based on 2823 samples.

GLOBAL.title: Top games by potential score
GLOBAL.description: Top game by potential score is 'Dota 2'. This metric weighs viewer engagement (60%) and player counts (40%) to find trending titles.

GLOBAL.title: What drives viewership
GLOBAL.description: Random Forest Regression identifies 'current_players' as the most influential factor on viewership for GLOBAL_TOTAL (R2 Score: 0.92).

GLOBAL.title: Streamer activity by day
GLOBAL.description: Streamer activity peaked on Tuesday during GLOBAL_TOTAL, showing when the creator community is most active.

GLOBAL.title: Viewer engagement by hour
GLOBAL.description: Visualizes average viewership throughout a 24-hour cycle. Peak engagement occurs at 2:00.

GLOBAL.title: Peak-hour game market share
GLOBAL.description: Top 5 games sorted by market share during peak hours. Plotted from highest to lowest moving clockwise starting from the top.

GLOBAL.title: Viewer-per-streamer ratio by day
GLOBAL.description: The best viewer-per-streamer ratio is found on Sunday. This indicates the most efficient time for streamers to gain audience share.

GLOBAL.title: Predicting rising games
GLOBAL.description:
Analysis: Can we use factors other than current viewer count to find rising stars?
The most accurate lead indicator is 'Peak Players'.
This proves that the Scoring Logic is NOT the superior method for picking games on the rise.

GLOBAL.title: Dominant success indicators
GLOBAL.description: The most critical indicator for success is 'current_players', accounting for 56.0% of the model's decision-making.
